text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki said she was going to practice dancing
in her new outfit, so I came to watch her lesson.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You're making me nervous with how
intensely you're watching me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So she says, but her every step is perfect and she
finishes the dance with a clean flourish. She's truly
a captivating sight to behold.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Hm, I like this outfit. It's nice and light,
and it makes me feel like I'm floating in it!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
What do you think? Did I look different from
usual?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's certainly a different look for her, but the
elegant colors and dainty decorations on her new
clothes suit her perfectly.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! Thank you! Knowing you think so highly
of it makes all the work I put into the design
worth it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Come, Trainer. Let's move to a new venue. I get
the feeling others will want to use this room soon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I ask her where we should go, Fuji Kiseki
merely winks at me and says it's a secret. I follow
her to...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Aha. I knew it'd be too early for anyone to be
here yet.
choice_data_list: Why are we at the gym?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
May I have this dance? Just one. If you'll agree to
take my hand...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I promise to fill your ears and heart with the most
stupendous music ever.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: It'll be a dance you'll never forget. I guarantee it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Good! Then, shall we begin?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki whisks me off, and we begin to dance
together.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You're doing great, Trainer. Just relax and follow
my lead!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She flashes me a warm smile, and I return it. The
only music we're dancing to is the mad drumming
beat of our own racing hearts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm stumbling gracelessly like an uncoordinated
fawn, but like magic, Fuji Kiseki transforms each
of my blunders into a perfect step.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! That was so much fun. Let's take a break
and then dance again, hm?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Are you wondering why I asked you to dance all
of a sudden? The truth is, I've wanted to ask you
since ages ago.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Do you know about the Ligne Droite? It's a dance
party held in celebration of the new year.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume who participate in it dress up as
beautifully as bouquets of fresh flowers and
dance their hearts out!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Of course! ...Which brings us back to now.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The Ligne Droite gives me the chance to dance
with my darling ponies, but it doesn't grant me
the same opportunity to dance with you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's not only my dear ponies that I want to bring
joy to, but you and others as well.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to focus on any single person. I want
to light up the lives of all those who are within the
range of my embrace.

text_block_list.name: Female Patient
text_block_list.text:
So even I still have the ability to make others
happy...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It might be wishful thinking, but if I reach out to
someone and they take my hand and smile, then
maybe...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Just maybe... that person will reach out to others
in the hopes of making them happy too.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That's the wish I imbued in this outfit.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I hope to be like a star in the sky—and their
smiles like roses in continuous bloom under the
warm and bright light of my shining star.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
No matter what road people are walking, I want
them to be able to find that light.
choice_data_list: Like a hand reaching out to them?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That's right.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
No matter how small a pinprick that light may be,
so long as its faintest twinkle reaches them, they
can find it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That would truly be a miracle, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel as if I've already been bestowed the miracle
that Fuji Kiseki is speaking of.
choice_data_list: Well, you've made one person smile here.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! That's where you're wrong. It's not just one
person who's smiling—it's two!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now what do you say to having another dance so
we can keep these smiles going?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We get back into position, grasp each other's
hands, and exchange smiles. Fuji Kiseki's grin is
softer than normal, beautiful like a sixth
magnitude star.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I hope I can make people happy, no matter where
they are or how difficult their circumstances may
be.
choice_data_list: If anyone can do it, you can. You'll be fine.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you! That means the absolute world to me!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to invest everything I've got into my
concerts as well as my races if I want to live up to
your words.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Now... May I have this dance?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nod grateful acceptance and place my palm into
her proffered hand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki bursts into laughter and spins me
around on even lighter and brighter steps than
the first time around.
